name: Mincemeat Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
Cream the shortening and sugar with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Gradually add the egg, beating well after each addition. Stir in the prepared mincemeat until combined.
Mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt. Fold this mixture into the creamed ingredients.
Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto greased cookie sheets.
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 16 to 18 minutes. Cool on wire racks.
Yield: Approximately 4-1/2 dozen cookies.
